title: Diego Chuquimia | Economics minor in Data Science Portfolio
text:
Project Areas

R Projects
Projects using R, tidyverse, ggplot2, Quarto, maps, and statistical analysis.


SQL Projects
Projects using SQL to clean, summarize, and analyze business and financial data.


Python Projects
Projects using Python, pandas, NumPy, and data analysis workflows.


Power BI Projects
Dashboards and reports built with Power BI.


Excel Projects
Excel projects using formulas, PivotTables, dashboards, and financial reports.

title: Diego Chuquimia’s CV
text:
Analytical Economics Student, Data Science Minor, BYU-Idaho.

chuquimiadiego@gmail.com | (571) 7767092 | linkedin.com/in/diegoach | linktr.ee/chdiego



Economics student at Brigham Young University - Idaho, graduating December 2026, with a minor in Data Science.


Financial analysis, operational reporting, and business intelligence tools including Power BI, Excel, SQL, and R.



Treasury operations, financial systems, forecasting, dashboard development, and enterprise analytics.




September 2022 - December 2026 Brigham Young University - Idaho

Bachelor of Science in Economics / Data Science minor
Marketing Director at Economics Society
Relevant coursework: Business Analytics, Labor Economics, Law & Economics, Behavioral Economics, and Data Science Programming






Data Science, Excel and Power BI – Data Analysis and Visualization, SQL for Finance, Alteryx for Financial Services.




Excel & Data Visualization: PivotTables, XLOOKUP/VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, reporting automation dashboards, data visualization, charts
Business Intelligence: SQL, Advanced Excel, Power BI, Tableau
Programming: Python, RStudio




Spanish, fluent; Portuguese, intermediate.




July 2024 - September 2025 Degree Verification Specialist, Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Created and reviewed degree evaluation reports, maintaining 100% accuracy in awarding processes and ensuring data integrity across student records.
Utilized Excel and CX platforms to examine and validate 100+ student data across academic programs, generating tracking reports to improve degree completion and support data-driven decisions.

March 2025 - September 2025 Peer Academic Mentor, Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Conducted and compiled detailed research on 25+ academic programs and industry certifications, supporting students in making informed decisions aligned with career market trends and salary benchmarks.
Trained peers using 20+ student cases and cooperated cross-functionally to improve accuracy and consistency in degree audit reviews.

August 2019 - December 2019 Logistics Assistant, Bountiful Corp, Auditing Firm, Santa Cruz, Bolivia

Performed financial reconciliations and validated transaction records using Excel to support reporting accuracy and financial controls.
Verified 100+ financial transactions, receipts, and purchase records against reports and balance sheets, identifying and resolving discrepancies.
Assisted with operational reporting and financial documentation processes in a fast-paced auditing environment.




December 2025 Housing Market Price Trend Analysis
R, Advanced Excel, Statistical Modeling, Regression Analysis, ANOVA

Analyzed 108 multi-year housing pricing data points using R and Excel to identify financial trends and cost patterns across property management companies.
Executed statistical analysis, including mean price comparisons, ANOVA testing, and linear regression modeling, to evaluate pricing changes over time.
Identified pricing outliers and interpreted market trends using quantitative analysis and financial data visualization techniques.

May 2026 Performance Recognition – Power BI Dashboard
Power BI, Microsoft Forms, Data Integration, Dashboard Development

Automated reporting workflows and data integration processes to improve reporting efficiency and real-time dashboard accuracy.
Developed scalable dashboard and reporting solutions to improve visibility into employee engagement and organizational recognition metrics.
